This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various diseases and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Aspidogyne gigantea include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
